name: Contemplating Cape Cod Clam Dip
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup clams; minced, OR 6 1/2 oz clams; minced, well drained
recipeInstructions:
1. Blend the clams, clam juice, and cream cheese to a smooth consistency.
2. Add all of the other ingredients and blend well.
3. Cover and chill.
Makes about 1 3/4 cups of dip. Suggested dippers: carrots, fennel, zucchini, wheat crackers.
